summary: 0.6.68 is a startup-default-only slice: lower the player volume default to 75 percent across runtime, hosted fallback, plugin UI, and generated demo3 scene defaults.
operatorSignals: The current volume-bump seam is separate and does not need to widen further in this slice.
The operator wants fresh player instances to stop coming up at full volume because 100 percent is hotter than needed.
actionsTaken: Moved the runtime record default to 0.75.
Moved the hosted fallback, plugin volume slider default, generated demo3 fallback, and checked-in demo3 template to the same 0.75 default.
Left transport, sync, slideshow, and preset-storage behavior untouched.
nonGoals: No right-stick volume-bump changes in this slice.
No transport, sync, slideshow, or default-preset autoload changes.
